case_title: JULIE C. LAO VS. PHILIPPINES, MICRONESIA & ORIENT NAVIGATION CO.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAO, JULIE C. AS TO DEFENDANT PHILIPPINES, MICRONESIA & ORIENT NAVIGATION CO., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAO, JULIE C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILIPPINES, MICRONESIA & ORIENT NAVIGATION CO., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $41,593.68 PRINCIPAL, $279.66 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $42,208.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
